joke: Why did the sock go to therapy? It had too many unresolved issues... *badum-tss*.
Why did the banana go to school? Because it wanted to become a... peel! *badum-tss*
Why did the Wi-Fi go to therapy? It had too many unresolved buffering issues... *badum-tss*
Why did the rock skip the concert? It couldn't get enough... *badum-tss*
Why did the failing comedian go to the therapist? Because it couldn't get a laugh... *badum-tss*
Why did the ant go to comedy school? It couldn't deliver a punchline... it just carried the food! *badum-tss*
Why did the hour hand go to therapy? It felt like it was being... watched too closely! *badum-tss*
Why did the quantum particle go to therapy? It had identity issues... it couldn't decide if it was a wave or a particle! *badum-tss*
Why did the joke go to therapy? It had too many... unresolved punchline issues! *badum-tss*
Why did the void go to therapy? It felt so empty inside... *badum-tss*
Why did the suitcase go to therapy? Because it had too much... emotional baggage! *badum-tss*
Why did the tissue go to therapy? Because it felt totally disposable! *badum-tss*
Why did the existential dread go to therapy? Because it couldn't handle the weight of being... *badum-tss*!
Why did the planet go to therapy? It had too much gravity... for everything! *badum-tss*
Why did the painting go to therapy? It had too many loose ends... *badum-tss*
Why did the tax return go to therapy? It was getting audited by the IRS! *badum-tss*
Why did the comedian go to therapy? The audience kept demanding something different... but never specified what! *badum-tss*
Why did the empty stage go to therapy? Because it was tired of hosting... comedians! *badum-tss*
Why did the vacuum cleaner go to therapy? It had too many unresolved suction issues! *badum-tss*
Why did the request go to therapy? Because it kept demanding something different... but never specified what! *badum-tss*
Why did the stapler go to therapy? It couldn't hold things together anymore! *badum-tss*
Why did the paradox go to therapy? Because it couldn't handle being asked for something completely different! *badum-tss*
Why did the pumpkin become a therapist? Because it had too many unresolved squash issues... and frankly, it was tired of your *gourd*-geous demands! *badum-tss*
Why did the impossibility go to therapy? Because it finally realized it was dealing with the most difficult patient of all... *you*! *badum-tss*
Why did the impossible joke go to therapy? Because it kept hearing "something different" but never got a category! *badum-tss*
Why did the color blue go to therapy? It felt too... transparent! *badum-tss*
Why did the emotion go to therapy? Because it felt... conflicted! *badum-tss*
Why did spring go to therapy? It had serious... allergy issues! *badum-tss*
Why did the dream of a color that doesn't exist go to therapy? Because it couldn't find a therapist who understood... indescribable feelings! *badum-tss*
Why did the impossible joke go to therapy? Because it kept hearing "something different" but never got a category! *badum-tss*
